reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
El café es bueno, la variedad de sándwiches es poca. Es un buen lugar si querés tomar un descanso en la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
The coffee is good, but the sandwich selection is limited. It's a good place if you want to take a break on the road.

reviews.comment:
Exelente atención sanitarios en exelente estado de limpieza lamentablemente el bufete cómo en todas las estaciones Y.P.F del País son carísimas​

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, restrooms in excellent condition and cleanliness; unfortunately, the buffet, as in all YPF stations in the country, is very expensive.
